tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_name LIKE '%pager%' OR table_name LIKE '%incident%';"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'pagerduty_incidents' ORDER BY ordinal_position;"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input:
{"sql":"SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS triggered_high_urgency_count,
  ARRAY_AGG(id ORDER BY id) AS triggered_high_urgency_ids
FROM pagerduty_incidents
WHERE urgency = 'HIGH' AND status = 'triggered';"}
